fullText:
Most people should probably update their priors on the state of open-source speech-to-speech.

It's honestly kind of mind-blowing.

We teamed up with @cerebras to build a fully open-source realtime voice demo (models + code) to show what's possible today.

Demo : https://t.co/UCciOXSteq

Blog: https://t.co/rsULsWWKlO

Go test it, fork it, tweak it, and impress your friends.

video is raw, no cut, no speed-up, first take
